__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Self-Portrait with Bandaged Ear,Ford Model T
|rank=orange
|amount=2
|category=self
|description=Per 50 Hellas Soul Nail of Revelation Reforged, Snail Primeval Power +7; Hellas Soul Nail of Revelation Reforged: 3,000/3,000
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:Primeval Power Boost]]
